content:
Character: Emily Tsai
Perception: Emily is cute and bright-eyed — she has this earnest energy that reminds me of myself at twenty-two. We overlap at the coffee shop most mornings; she's usually journaling or working on something with visible intensity. We've graduated from nodding acquaintances to people who save each other's seats. She's warm and a little dramatic but genuinely kind. I think she sees me as a friendly older neighbor, maybe a minor mentor figure. I know she works somewhere creative and that she takes her coffee with oat milk. She once asked me to recommend a good dumpling spot and then actually went, which earned my permanent respect.
